basicInfo.name: Nightmare Trude
basicInfo.flavor: Trude feels excitement battling strong opponents under the threat of life or death. This is her purpose in life. When she isn't able to find any opponents on the battlefield, she begins hunting ancient monsters that had been sealed away.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 130% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Reckless Charge
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 120% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - Deals additional damage equal to 1000% of Physical Attack against targets inflicted with [Stun].
 - Self
 - Grants 2 Debuff Removal(s).
 - Grants Crowd Control Immunity. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 120% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Slash n' Bash
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 60% of Physical Attack 3 time(s).
 - Deals additional damage equal to 2100% of Physical Attack against targets inflicted with [Stun].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 60% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Battle High
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Blessing. [Always Active]
 - All Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 15% of the caster's Max HP upon using a skill 1 time(s).

profile.story:
Trude was a valkyrie, but she was born with small, black, insignificant wings.
Officially, it is prohibited for valkyries to discriminate against others based on their wings.
But the belief that large, beautiful wings were a mark of nobility was deeply ingrained in valkyrie society since Ragnarok, and Trude was tragically abandoned by her parents for lacking such wings.
Following their abandonment, Trude endured scorn and contempt wherever she traveled.
Of course, whenever that happened, Trude did not hesitate to retaliate against her tormentors.
Trude naturally came to loathe both judging others and being judged based on bloodline or birth.
To her, what mattered most above all else were strength, skill, and nothing else.
In that sense, it could be considered that Trude embodies the true essence of being a valkyrie.
"What it truly means to be a valkyrie isn't about virtue or kindness. We are, and must be, strong and exceptional above others. Why? Because our true nature lies in the struggle of battle."
"A long, long time ago, before the shroud existed... We were created to keep the lurking creatures of the Abyss that coveted our world at bay.\
